name: Potato Croquettes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup (1 oz) shredded low-fat Swiss or cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potato in boiling water for 20 minutes, or until tender; drain.
2. Transfer to a bowl.
3. Beat potato at medium speed until smooth. Add cheese and the remaining ingredients (mustard, hot sauce, salt, egg white). Mix well.
4. Divide mixture into 10 equal portions and shape into balls.
5. Dip each ball in egg white, then roll in corn flakes.
6. Place on a baking sheet coated with nonstick spray.
7. Bake at 400°F for 10-15 minutes, or until crisp and golden.
Yield: 5 servings (166 calories per serving)
